member.name: T:CHDSharp.Chd
member.summary: Provides methods for validating and inspecting CHD files using parallel decompression.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Chd.TaskCount
member.summary: Number of parallel decompression tasks used during verification.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckFile(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.UInt32}@,System.Byte[]@,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Validates a CHD file from a using parallel decompression and hash verification. Returns the CHD version, SHA1, and MD5 hashes.
member.param: The stream to read the CHD from.
The filename associated with the stream, used for logging.
If true, performs full decompression and hash verification; otherwise only validates the header.
When this method returns, contains the CHD version number, or null if invalid.
When this method returns, contains the SHA1 hash from the header, or null if invalid.
When this method returns, contains the MD5 hash from the header, or null if invalid.
member.returns: on success; otherwise an error code.
member.remarks: This method does not handle differential (parent/child) CHDs. Use for those.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckFileWithParent(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.UInt32}@,System.Byte[]@,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Fully verifies a (possibly child/differential) CHD, resolving parent references against the CHD at (pass null for a standalone CHD). Reads the whole image via the random-access API, validates the raw-data hash (SHA1/MD5) and, for V4/V5, the metadata SHA1. This is a sequential (single-threaded) verify - use for the fast parallel path on standalone CHDs.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Chd.CheckHeader(System.IO.Stream,System.UInt32@,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Reads and validates the CHD file header signature and version.
member.param: The stream positioned at the start of the CHD file.
When this method returns, contains the header length in bytes.
When this method returns, contains the CHD version number.
member.returns: true if the header signature is valid and the version is recognized; otherwise false.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.ChdFile
member.summary:
Provides read-only random access to a CHD file (V1-V5), including parent / child differential CHD chains.
Open a standalone CHD with . For a child (differential) CHD, supply its parent with or . Then decompress individual hunks with or read arbitrary byte ranges with .
NOTE: an instance is NOT thread-safe. It seeks a shared stream and mutates shared per-hunk buffers, so all calls must be serialized by the caller.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Version
member.summary: CHD format version (1-5).

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.TotalBytes
member.summary: Total size in bytes of the decompressed image.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.HunkBytes
member.summary: Size in bytes of a single hunk (block).

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.HunkCount
member.summary: Number of hunks (blocks) in the image.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Sha1
member.summary: SHA1 of the full image (including metadata for V4/V5), or the raw SHA1 when that is all that is available. May be null for V1/V2.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.RawSha1
member.summary: SHA1 of ONLY the raw (decompressed) image data, excluding metadata. This is what a full sequential read of the image hashes to. Null for V1/V2.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Md5
member.summary: MD5 of the raw image data (V1-V3). Null for V4/V5.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.ChdFile.RequiresParent
member.summary: True if this CHD is a differential child that requires a parent CHD to read.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a standalone CHD file from disk for random access. Fails with if the file is a child CHD.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from disk, resolving parent references against the parent CHD at . The parent is opened internally and disposed together with the returned instance.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.String,CHDSharp.ChdFile,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from disk, resolving parent references against an already-open . The caller retains ownership of (it is not disposed by this instance). Pass null for a standalone CHD.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a standalone CHD from an existing seekable stream for random access.
member.param: Seekable, readable stream positioned anywhere; it will be seeked as needed.
If false, the stream is disposed when this instance is disposed.
When this method returns, contains the opened instance, or null on error.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Open(System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,CHDSharp.ChdFile,CHDSharp.ChdFile@)
member.summary: Opens a (possibly child) CHD from an existing seekable stream, resolving parent references against (null = standalone).

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.ReadHunk(System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a single hunk into .
member.param: Destination buffer of at least bytes.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.ChdFile.Read(System.UInt64,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads bytes from the decompressed image starting at , decompressing hunks on demand. A single hunk is cached so sequential reads within the same hunk avoid re-decoding.

member.summary: Computes the base-2 logarithm of a 32-bit unsigned integer using the De Bruijn sequence.
member.returns: The floor of log2 of the value.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16
member.summary: Static class for computing 16-bit CRC checksums used in FLAC audio frames. Supports combining and subtracting CRCs for efficient multi-block operations.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.table
member.summary: Precomputed CRC-16 lookup table (256 entries).

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.ComputeChecksum(System.UInt16,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Computes a 16-bit CRC checksum over a portion of a byte array, continuing from a previous CRC value.
member.param: The starting position in the array.
The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: The updated 16-bit CRC checksum.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.ComputeChecksum(System.UInt16,System.Byte*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Computes a 16-bit CRC checksum over a raw byte buffer, continuing from a previous CRC value. Operates on raw pointers.
member.param: The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: The updated 16-bit CRC checksum.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.Reflect(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reflects the lower 16 bits of a CRC value (used for reversing bit order).
member.returns: The reflected 16-bit value.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.Combine(System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Int64)
member.summary: Combines two 16-bit CRC checksums as if the data was concatenated.
member.param: The CRC of the first data block.
The CRC of the second data block.
The length of the second data block in bytes.
member.returns: The combined CRC value.
member.exception: Thrown if is negative.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Flac.FlacDeps.Crc16.Subtract(System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Int64)
member.summary: Subtracts a 16-bit CRC checksum as if a block of data was removed.
member.param: The CRC of the combined data.
The CRC of the data block to subtract.
The length of the data block to subtract in bytes.
member.returns: The resulting CRC value after subtraction.
member.exception: Thrown if is negative.

members.member:
Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples A window function is applied before calculation.
Calculates autocorrelation data from audio samples. A window function is applied before calculation. Operates on raw pointers.
Pointer to sample data. Pointer to the window function values. Number of samples. Minimum lag to compute. Maximum lag to compute. Destination buffer for autocorrelation values (accumulated).

members.member:
Levinson-Durbin recursion. Produces LPC coefficients from autocorrelation data.
Produces LPC coefficients from reflection coefficients using the Levinson-Durbin recursion. Operates on raw pointers.
Maximum LPC order. Pointer to reflection coefficients. Destination buffer for LPC coefficients, stored as a flat array indexed by [order * MAX_LPC_ORDER + coefficient]. Thrown if exceeds .

member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA decompression stream with known input and output sizes.

member.summary: Initializes a new LZMA or LZMA2 decompression stream with full configuration.
member.param: Properties header (5 bytes for LZMA, 1 byte for LZMA2).
Exact size in bytes of the compressed data, or -1 if unknown.
Exact size in bytes of the decompressed data, or -1 if unknown.
Optional preset dictionary stream for training the decoder, or null.
true to use LZMA2 format; false for LZMA.
Optional pre-allocated buffer for the output window, or null.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports reading. Always true.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports seeking. Always false.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports writing. Always false.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Flush
member.summary: Does nothing. The stream has no buffers to flush.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Length
member.summary: Gets the total length of the decompressed stream, or the current position plus remaining available bytes if unknown.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position within the decompressed stream.
member.exception: The setter always throws. Use to advance.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of decompressed bytes from the stream and advances the position.
member.param: The buffer to write decompressed data into.
The zero-based byte offset in at which to begin writing.
The maximum number of bytes to read.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer, or 0 if the end of the stream has been reached.
member.exception: Thrown when the compressed data is corrupt or truncated.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Seek(System.Int64,System.IO.SeekOrigin)
member.summary: Advances the current position by bytes from . Other origins are not supported.
member.param: The number of bytes to skip forward.
member.returns: The new position in the stream.
member.exception: is not .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.SetLength(System.Int64)
member.summary: Not supported. The stream is read-only.
member.exception: Always thrown.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.LZMA.LzmaStream.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Not supported. The stream is read-only.
member.exception: Always thrown.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian
member.summary: Provides extension methods for reading and writing big-endian byte order values from and arrays.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.Reverse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reverses the byte order of the array in-place and returns the same array.
member.returns: A reference to after reversal.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt16BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian from the stream.
member.returns: The unsigned 16-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadInt16BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian from the stream.
member.returns: The signed 16-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt32BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian from the stream.
member.returns: The unsigned 32-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt48BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian 48-bit unsigned integer from the stream into a .
member.returns: The 48-bit value read in big-endian order, stored in a .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt64BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian from the stream.
member.returns: The unsigned 64-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadInt32BE(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian from the stream.
member.returns: The signed 32-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadBytesRequired(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the exact number of bytes requested from the stream, throwing if fewer bytes are available.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.
member.returns: A byte array containing exactly bytes.
member.exception: Thrown when the stream contains fewer than bytes.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt16BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian 16-bit unsigned integer from a byte array at the specified offset.
member.param: The byte array to read from.
The zero-based offset at which to begin reading.
member.returns: The unsigned 16-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt24BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian 24-bit unsigned integer from a byte array at the specified offset into a .
member.param: The byte array to read from.
The zero-based offset at which to begin reading.
member.returns: The 24-bit value read in big-endian order, stored in a .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt32BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian 32-bit unsigned integer from a byte array at the specified offset.
member.param: The byte array to read from.
The zero-based offset at which to begin reading.
member.returns: The unsigned 32-bit value read in big-endian order.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.ReadUInt48BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian 48-bit unsigned integer from a byte array at the specified offset into a .
member.param: The byte array to read from.
The zero-based offset at which to begin reading.
member.returns: The 48-bit value read in big-endian order, stored in a .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.PutUInt16BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer in big-endian order to a byte array at the specified offset.
member.param: The byte array to write to.
The zero-based offset at which to begin writing.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.BigEndian.PutUInt24BE(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 24-bit unsigned integer in big-endian order to a byte array at the specified offset.
member.param: The byte array to write to.
The zero-based offset at which to begin writing.
The value to write (only the lower 24 bits are used).

The zero-based offset at which to begin writing.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.CdRom
member.summary: Provides CD-ROM ECC (Error Correction Code) generation for CHD sector data, producing P and Q parity bytes.

members.member: @brief ------------------------------------------------- poffsets - each row represents the addresses used to calculate a byte of the ECC P data 86 (*2) ECC P bytes, 24 values represented by each -------------------------------------------------.

@brief ------------------------------------------------- qoffsets - each row represents the addresses used to calculate a byte of the ECC Q data 52 (*2) ECC Q bytes, 43 values represented by each -------------------------------------------------.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC
member.summary: A CRC-32 calculator using the ISO 3309 / ITU-T V.42 polynomial, with an 8-table slicing implementation for performance.

member.name: F:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.CRC32Lookup
member.summary: Precomputed CRC-32 lookup tables (8 tables, 256 entries each) for fast slicing.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class and resets the internal state.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.Reset
member.summary: Resets the CRC-32 state to its initial value and clears the byte count.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.SlurpBlock(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes a block of data through the CRC-32 algorithm using 8-byte slicing where possible.
member.param: The byte array containing the data to process.
The zero-based offset in at which to begin processing.
The number of bytes to process.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.Crc32ResultB
member.summary: Gets the CRC-32 result as a big-endian byte array.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.Crc32Result
member.summary: Gets the CRC-32 result as a signed 32-bit integer.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.Crc32ResultU
member.summary: Gets the CRC-32 result as an unsigned 32-bit integer.

member.name: P:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.TotalBytesRead
member.summary: Gets the total number of bytes processed since the last .

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.CalculateDigest(System.Byte[],System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Calculates the CRC-32 digest of a data range without mutating instance state.
member.param: The byte array containing the data.
The zero-based offset in at which to start.
The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: The CRC-32 digest as an unsigned 32-bit integer.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC.VerifyDigest(System.UInt32,System.Byte[],System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Verifies that a CRC-32 digest matches the computed digest of a data range.
member.param: The byte array containing the data.
The zero-based offset in at which to start.
The number of bytes to process.
member.returns: true if the computed digest matches ; otherwise false.

member.name: T:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC16
member.summary: A CCITT-style CRC-16 calculator used by the CHD format.

member.name: M:CHDSharp.Utils.CRC16.calc(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates a CCITT CRC-16 checksum over the specified data.
member.param: The byte array containing the data to process.
The number of bytes to process from the start of .
member.returns: The computed 16-bit CRC checksum.
